title: phacelia hastata var. leucophylla
intro: Phacelia hastata var. leucophylla, also known as the white-stemmed phacelia, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the borage family (Boraginaceae). It is native to North America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems, due to its ability to promote healing, reduce inflammation, and combat infections. Herbal preparations of Phacelia hastata var. leucophylla include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
